channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.4%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting: How a man whose grandfather was an armed robber now finds himself on the cusp of No 10

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full
item.description: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It's hilarious how the disastrous 2025 reshuffle has become a master stroke in 'locking enough Blairites into a loveleless marriage with the old right to make it very hard for Wes Streeting to get on the ballot'. Well...
item.description: It's hilarious how the disastrous 2025 reshuffle has become a master stroke in 'locking enough Blairites into a loveleless marriage with the old right to make it very hard for Wes Streeting to get on the ballot'. Well...
